{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032206183724C11EE34B06E63F556D"}"},"total":463},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7596311363367289624","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"大业火出品，果然精品，每个人都描述的生动活现，有血有肉，我希望作者可以一天十万字，榜一大哥会礼物满满送的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768656091,"group_id":"7567368636650753049","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"二次元","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1pbQJY1bmzHhcrDokbEHBwjoTPGsZOUhQIBV6QpA53c","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/ef14cbc7f1be4ae5bfb95e5ffc82492b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708029&x-signature=RJkqLOHM8VWNiU6OViGarvmG7F4%3D","user_id":"3122268525824286","user_name":"逐梦之翼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3122268525824286","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1654054266,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7567368636650753049","book_info":{"abstract":"【洛克斯海贼团】【多果实】【多女主】【争霸】
方火撞大运穿越到了海贼王世界的古月村，他的灵魂在穿越时空之时裂开了，发生了特殊变异，融合本世界能量形成了九只同源又独立的灵魂虫。
随着第一只灵魂虫融合恶魔果实能力，一个九果实能力者诞生...
月光果实、重力果实、吸血鬼果实、莫莫果实、响雷果实、青龙果实...
在方火的帮助下，洛克斯海贼团提前现世，拥有了前所未有的究极阵容...
你见过拥有红伯爵和罗杰、雷利、贾巴的洛克斯海贼团吗？
